---
title: "cstar_dispatcher.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\cstar_dispatcher.py"
loc: 136
complexity: 23
logic_score: 2.25
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 5.52
overall_score: 2.16
---

## Intent
The `cstar_dispatcher.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on CorvusDispatcher, __init__, _discover_all, show_help, run, _execute_skill, _record_agentic_heartbeat, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via CorvusDispatcher, __init__, _discover_all, show_help, run, _execute_skill, _record_agentic_heartbeat, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 64 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)
- [src.cstar.core.tui](file://src.cstar.core.tui)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `CorvusDispatcher`
- `__init__`
- `_discover_all`
- `show_help`
- `run`
- `_execute_skill`
- `_record_agentic_heartbeat`
- `main`
